title: Quality Of Life plus (QoL+)
description: This Modpack Forced on Enhanced the Quality of game
body:
### Quality of Life Plus (QoL+) 
This is a carefully curated modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience through improved visuals and graphics. This modpack focuses on elevating the game's aesthetics while maintaining the original gameplay feel. From dynamic lighting and realistic shadows to high-quality textures and smoother animations, QoL+ transforms the way Minecraft looks — making every scene more immersive and enjoyable. Perfect for players who love a visually enriched experience without drastically altering core mechanics.

### Key Include mods

<details>
<summary>Click Me</summary>

JourneyMap-Real-time mapping in game or in a web browser as you explore.

Continuity-Continuity is a Minecraft mod that allows resource packs that use the OptiFine connected textures

MidnightLib-MidnightLib is a lightweight library that provides common utils and a configuration system for mods.

Cherished Worlds-Cherished Worlds is a mod that adds the ability to favorite/pin/bookmark certain worlds.

YetAnotherConfigLib(YACL)-A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft.

Fabric API-Essential hooks for modding with Fabric.

Iris Shaders-You Can use Shaders in Sodium 

Text Placeholder API-It's a small, JIJ-able API that allows creation and parsing placeholders within strings and Minecraft Text Components.

Sodium-Rendring Optimise 

Chat Heads-See who you're chatting with!

Better Ping Display-A mod that displays each player's ping in the player list as a number.

Reese's Sodium Options-Alternative Options Menu for Sodium.

Smooth Scrolling-Scroll Hot bar smoothly 

Controlling-Adds a search bar to the Key-Bindings menu

Hold My Items-Now your hand be visible when you holding items

Entity Model Feature & Entity Texuer Feature- Shopport Optifine Emissive Texuer and Animation.

Wakes-Adds splashes and wakes while traveling on water.

Camera Utils-Camera Utils is a client side Fabric mod that adds convenient features related to the players camera.

Animated loading screen-This Mod change the mojang Loading Screen to Animated mojang Loading Screen.

Visuality-Little visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles.

Flow-Configurable ease in-out inventory UI transitions.









</details>
